name: Living Room
description: Common social room with a hearth as focal point. Floor in @floor, walls in @primary, open ceiling with only lintels. Includes a stairs-built sofa facing the room center, a coffee table, a bookshelf, a fireplace, at least two carpet rugs and at least two light sources. Big windows on the south wall provide daylight.

required_furniture.rule: Row of stairs facing the room center, opposite the fireplace wall
One block in front of the sofa, between sofa and fireplace
Against a side wall, not blocking the hearth or sofa
On the longest interior wall; netherrack base with a campfire on top
At least one large rug between sofa and fireplace, plus a secondary rug
Mounted near the lintel; at least two interior cells lit

placement_rules: Big windows on the south wall
Bookshelf against a side wall perpendicular to the fireplace
Coffee table between sofa and fireplace
Carpets centered on the social zone between sofa and hearth
lighting_ventilation: South-facing window band (3-4 wide, ideally with @glass panes) provides daylight; campfire smoke vents through the open ceiling; lanterns/torches near the lintel light the corners.

medieval.notes: Oak planks + cobblestone, oak stairs sofa, red carpet, torches.

modern.notes: Smooth quartz walls, polished andesite floor, stone stairs sofa, gray carpet, redstone lamps. Glass panes are white-tinted.

fantasy.notes: Dark oak + mossy cobble, purpur accents, dark oak stairs sofa, purple carpet, sea lanterns.
